# thinking-orbs provenance

This directory vendors the unmodified TypeScript source of
[`thinking-orbs`](https://github.com/Jakubantalik/thinking-orbs).

- Upstream version: `v0.1.1`
- Upstream commit: `382be79c472cd600277f01e14f98f8c0ee18dcb0`
- Retrieved: 2026-07-21
- License: MIT, copyright (c) 2026 Jakub Antalik
- Local modifications to upstream files: none

The adjacent `LICENSE` file is the complete license supplied by the upstream
author. Project-specific presentation and state mapping live outside this
directory in `src/components/ai-thinking-orb.tsx` and the application styles.

When updating, replace the directory from a reviewed immutable upstream tag,
record its full commit hash here, preserve `LICENSE`, and review the diff before
accepting the new source. Do not update from the moving `main` branch.
